title: Risk Reduction and Diversification Bill: Dynasty Wallet Mitigation

reasoning.problem: I intend to propose a bill authorizing a risk-reduction trade to partially diversify the Dynasty wallet, while simultaneously finding additional wallets to transfer these assets to. This bill should include a framework for identifying and evaluating new wallet options, emphasizing security, decentralization, and diversification of custodians. Additionally, this petition will propose a phased implementation plan to ensure safe execution and continuous learning in the process.

technical_spec.description: To be defined by the House of Builders.
